# QantumIQ
> Advanced consulting at the intersection of AI, quantum computing, and human ingenuity.

## About
QantumIQ is a global consulting firm headquartered in Oakland, MD with 13 offices across 7 countries. We specialize in AI/ML solutions, quantum computing & post-quantum cryptography, digital transformation, and C-suite advisory. 500+ clients served, $4.2B+ in client value delivered, 15+ years of excellence.

## Services
- [AI & Machine Learning Solutions](https://qantumiq.com/services/ai-ml.html): Enterprise AI strategy, predictive analytics, generative AI, computer vision, MLOps
- [Quantum Computing & PQC](https://qantumiq.com/services/quantum-computing.html): Quantum readiness assessments, post-quantum cryptography migration, quantum algorithm design
- [Digital Transformation](https://qantumiq.com/services/digital-transformation.html): Cloud architecture, legacy modernization, data platform engineering
- [C-Suite Advisory](https://qantumiq.com/services/c-suite-advisory.html): Board-level strategic guidance, technology due diligence, transformation roadmaps
- [Business Process Optimisation](https://qantumiq.com/services/business-process.html): Process mining, intelligent automation, operational excellence
- [Management Consulting](https://qantumiq.com/services/management-consulting.html): Organizational design, change management, performance improvement
- [Information & Insights](https://qantumiq.com/services/information-insights.html): Data strategy, analytics platforms, business intelligence

## Industries
- [Financial Services](https://qantumiq.com/industries/financial-services.html): AI risk models, fraud detection, PQC migration, digital banking
- [Healthcare](https://qantumiq.com/industries/healthcare.html): Clinical AI, interoperability, value-based care analytics
- [Pharmaceuticals & Biotech](https://qantumiq.com/industries/pharmaceuticals.html): AI drug discovery, cell & gene therapy, CRISPR, bioprocessing
- [Technology](https://qantumiq.com/industries/technology.html): Product-led growth, platform strategy, cloud architecture
- [Telecommunications](https://qantumiq.com/industries/telecommunications.html): 5G monetization, AI network ops, quantum-safe security
- [Energy](https://qantumiq.com/industries/energy.html): Grid optimization, predictive maintenance, clean energy transition
- [Government & Defence](https://qantumiq.com/industries/government.html): National security AI, public service transformation
- [Sustainability & Water](https://qantumiq.com/industries/sustainability.html): ESG data strategy, smart water networks, carbon intelligence
- [Media & Entertainment](https://qantumiq.com/industries/media-entertainment.html): Streaming strategy, AI content ops, audience intelligence
